description: Implement Router.swapMulti(MultiSwapParams) per FR-2/8 with atomic N-to-M settlement. Validates array lengths, rejects duplicate tokens within inputs and within outputs, rejects any intersection between inputs and outputs, pulls all inputs via balance-diff, deducts pro-rata protocol fee and optional input-side partner fee on each input token, forwards remaining inputs to the executor, snapshots all outputs before/after, applies per-output positive-slippage capping vs outputQuotes[i], optionally deducts output-side partner fee pro-rata, enforces each outputMins[i], transfers each output to recipient, emits one Swap event per output so off-chain indexers can track attribution without changing the FR-17 event shape.
commit: feat(router): implement swapMulti() with duplicate checks and pro-rata fees
steps: Add internal helper `_requireNoDuplicates(address[] memory tokens) internal pure` that does an O(n^2) pairwise scan and reverts DuplicateToken(tokens[i]) on match. Add `_requireNoIntersection(address[] memory inputs, address[] memory outputs) internal pure` that reverts InputOutputIntersection(token) on any overlap.

Add `_validateMultiSwap(MultiSwapParams memory p)` that reverts ArrayLengthMismatch if inputTokens.length != inputAmounts.length or outputTokens.length != outputQuotes.length or outputTokens.length != outputMins.length; reverts ZeroInputAmount if inputTokens.length == 0 or any inputAmounts[i] == 0; reverts ZeroOutputQuote if outputTokens.length == 0 or any outputQuotes[i] == 0; reverts ZeroOutputMin if any outputMins[i] == 0; reverts InvalidSlippageBounds if any outputMins[i] > outputQuotes[i]; reverts ProtocolFeeExceedsCap/PartnerFeeExceedsCap/InvalidPartnerRecipient/ExecutorNotSet identically to the single-swap validator; calls _requireNoDuplicates(inputTokens), _requireNoDuplicates(outputTokens), _requireNoIntersection(inputTokens, outputTokens). For native ETH, verify exactly one input is NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL when msg.value > 0 and msg.value equals its inputAmount; revert ETHValueMismatch otherwise.

Replace `revert NotImplemented();` in swapMulti with: (a) _validateMultiSwap(params); (b) loop inputs[i]: `pulled[i] = _pullInput(inputTokens[i], inputAmounts[i]); protocolFees[i] = pulled[i]*protocolFeeBps/10000; inputPartnerFees[i] = partnerFeeOnOutput ? 0 : pulled[i]*partnerFeeBps/10000; if (inputPartnerFees[i] > 0) _transferOut(inputTokens[i], partnerRecipient, inputPartnerFees[i]); uint256 fwd = pulled[i] - protocolFees[i] - inputPartnerFees[i]; _forwardInputToExecutor(inputTokens[i], fwd);` where the last helper transfers ERC20 (SafeERC20.safeTransfer to executor) or records a native-ETH forwarding amount to be used in the single executor call.

After pre-loading all inputs, snapshot outputBefore[j] = _balanceOf(outputTokens[j]); then invoke `IExecutor(executor).executePath{value: nativeForwardAmount}(weirollCommands, weirollState);` once. nativeForwardAmount is whichever input token mapped to NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL's forward amount or zero.

For each output j: `amountOut[j] = _balanceOf(outputTokens[j]) - outputBefore[j]; positiveSlippage[j] = 0; if (!passPositiveSlippageToUser && amountOut[j] > outputQuotes[j]) { positiveSlippage[j] = amountOut[j] - outputQuotes[j]; amountOut[j] = outputQuotes[j]; } outputPartnerFee[j] = 0; if (partnerFeeOnOutput && partnerFeeBps > 0) { outputPartnerFee[j] = amountOut[j]*partnerFeeBps/10000; amountOut[j] -= outputPartnerFee[j]; _transferOut(outputTokens[j], partnerRecipient, outputPartnerFee[j]); } if (amountOut[j] < outputMins[j]) revert SlippageExceeded(outputTokens[j], amountOut[j], outputMins[j]); _transferOut(outputTokens[j], recipient, amountOut[j]);`

Emit one Swap event per output j with: sender=msg.sender, inputToken = inputTokens[0] (or NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL if any), inputAmount = sum(inputAmounts), outputToken = outputTokens[j], amountOut = pre-cap amountOut including positiveSlippage and outputPartnerFee, amountToUser = post-cap post-fee amountOut, protocolFee = sum(protocolFees)/outputs.length pro-rata (or sum attributed to this output -- document choice in NatSpec), partnerFee = (sum(inputPartnerFees) + outputPartnerFee[j]) / outputs.length pro-rata, positiveSlippageCaptured = positiveSlippage[j], partnerRecipient. Document pro-rata attribution in a NatSpec comment above swapMulti.
acceptance_criteria: [auto] `forge build` compiles src/Router.sol with zero errors.
[auto] grep -n 'revert NotImplemented' src/Router.sol returns zero matches after this task.
[auto] grep -n 'function swapMulti(MultiSwapParams calldata params) external payable' src/Router.sol matches exactly one line.
[auto] grep -n '_requireNoDuplicates\|_requireNoIntersection' src/Router.sol shows both helpers defined and both used from _validateMultiSwap.
[auto] grep -n 'revert DuplicateToken\|revert InputOutputIntersection\|revert ArrayLengthMismatch' src/Router.sol matches at least 3 lines.
[auto] grep -n 'IExecutor(executor).executePath' src/Router.sol shows a single invocation in swapMulti (unified executor call).
[auto] grep -n 'emit Swap(' src/Router.sol matches at least two lines (one in swap(), one in swapMulti() loop).
[manual] Pro-rata fee attribution rule is documented in NatSpec above swapMulti (chosen policy: equal split across outputs OR proportional to outputQuotes) and matches what INF-0009 tests assert.
[manual] Native ETH support in swapMulti: tx reverts if msg.value != 0 and no input is NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL; reverts if multiple inputs are NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL.
